title: News | Get Involved Today — Ian Byrne MP - Working for West Derby
h1: New Right To Food UK Commission launches in Westminster
headings: h3: Learn more about the Right To Food UK Commission
text_excerpt: News | Get Involved Today — Ian Byrne MP - Working for West Derby 0 Skip to Content Ian Byrne MP - Working for West Derby About Contact & Advice Your Page Moss West Derby Centre for Social Justice Right To Food UK Commission Right To Food Campaign Hillsborough Law Now Campaign 'The Real Truth' Legacy Project Sign Up Open Menu Close Menu Ian Byrne MP - Working for West Derby About Contact & Advice Your Page Moss West Derby Centre for Social Justice Right To Food UK Commission Right To Food Campaign Hillsborough Law Now Campaign 'The Real Truth' Legacy Project Sign Up Open Menu Close Menu About Contact & Advice Your Page Moss West Derby Centre for Social Justice Right To Food UK Commission Right To Food Campaign Hillsborough Law Now Campaign 'The Real Truth' Legacy Project Sign Up Ian Byrne 11/17/25 Ian Byrne 11/17/25 New Right To Food UK Commission launches in Westminster Later today I will officially launch the Right to Food UK Commission in Parliament (Monday 17 November). Its central mission is to provide a Right to Food roadmap to end hunger and foodbank Britain. Read More Ian Byrne 7/1/25 Ian Byrne 7/1/25 Speaking out against Universal Credit & PIP Bill at 2nd Reading Today I told the Government that its Universal Credit and PIP Bill is shambolic, because it is. Watch my speech. Read More Ian Byrne 6/20/25 Ian Byrne 6/20/25 Assisted Dying Bill: why I’m voting NO Today I am voting NO to the Assisted Dying Bill, following much research and deliberation. Watch my video to find out more. Read More Ian Byrne 6/12/25 Ian Byrne 6/12/25 Questions for the Government on delay to Hillsborough Law Today I urged the Government to introduce a Hillsborough Law worthy of the name or be seen as part of the ongoing betrayal of survivors and families of Hillsborough and all those affected by state cover ups. Read More Ian Byrne 3/27/25 Ian Byrne 3/27/25 Speaking to Sky News: the impact of welfare cuts on constituents The Government's plans to cuts to support for disabled people will push 250,000 people - including 50,000 children - into poverty, according to the Government's own analysis. Today I spoke to Sky News about why I cannot and will not support these cuts. Read More Ian Byrne 3/17/25 Ian Byrne 3/17/25 Pensions compensation: Speaking up for 50s-born women Today in Parliament I urged the Government to change course and award compensation to all 1950s-born women affected by changes to their pension age. #Waspi #CEDAWInLaw Read More Ian Byrne 2/10/25 Ian Byrne 2/10/25 End toxic and dehumanising narrative on immigration Today in Parliament I called out the toxic, dehumanising political narrative around immigration and the shameless posturing of some politicians on this issue. Read More Ian Byrne 12/18/24 Ian Byrne 12/18/24 Watch: I ask PM to let MPs vote on Waspi compensation Today at PMQs I asked the Prime Minister to let MPs vote on whether the compensation should in fact be paid. Read More Ian Byrne 12/13/24 Ian Byrne 12/13/24 Letter sent to Livv Housing CEO re industrial dispute Today I have written to the Livv Housing CEO urging her to work with Unite and Unison to bring the current industrial dispute to an end. Read More Ian Byrne 12/12/24 Ian Byrne 12/12/24 EDM tabled on Livv Housing dispute Today I have tabled a Parliamentary motion regarding the ongoing industrial dispute at Livv Housing Group. Read More Ian Byrne 11/29/24 Ian Byrne 11/29/24 My petition for proper funding for hospices launched today Whatever your view on assisted dying, everyone agrees end-of-life care needs more funding. That's why I've launched a petition calling for proper funding for hospices. Read More Ian Byrne 11/29/24 Ian Byrne 11/29/24 Today I will be voting against the Terminally Ill Adults (End of Life) Bill Today I will be voting against the Terminally Ill Adults (End of Life) Bill. Click ‘Read More’ for full statement. Read More Ian Byrne 11/8/24 Ian Byrne 11/8/24 LIVERPOOL YOU ARE AMAZING!! Zoe’s Place Liverpool is saved. Thank you! We’ve onl
